summary: Regression test completed after major frontend refactoring (App.js split from 6991 lines to ~110 lines + 14 page files). All 16 pages tested successfully. One critical bug was found and FIXED: BlogPage was crashing due to missing import (CalendarDays from lucide-react) and missing constant (defaultBlogPosts). Fix applied to BlogPages.jsx.

homepage.details: Hero section, world map, stats bar, top 5 channels, trending section all rendering correctly

leaderboard_page.details: Table with 500 channels, search/filter/sort controls working, SEO content present

countries_page.details: 197 country cards rendering with top channel previews

country_page.details: USA page renders with channel listings, breadcrumbs, stats

trending_page.details: Fastest growing (20 channels) and biggest gainers (20 channels) sections

compare_page.details: Search box for channel comparison, educational content present

race_page.details: Milestone races showing race to 250M, 200M, 150M subscribers

milestones_page.details: Upcoming milestones tracker (MrBeast ~31 days to 500M), milestone history timeline

categories_page.details: 8 category cards (Music, Entertainment, News, Kids, Gaming, Education, Sports, Technology)

rising_stars_page.details: Filter buttons (Fastest Growth %, Most Daily Gains, Going Viral), channel grid

blog_page.details: Was crashing with ReferenceError: CalendarDays is not defined. Fixed by adding missing imports.

top_100_page.details: Top 100 channels list with podium display for top 3

about_page.details: Static page renders with mission, features, data sources sections

seo_landing_page.details: SEO landing page renders with data-testid='top-youtube-channels-page'

channel_page.details: MrBeast channel page renders with stats, growth chart, related channels, FAQs

navigation.details: Clicking channel rows navigates to channel detail page correctly

console_warnings.warning: Hydration warnings about span inside tbody/select/option - likely caused by development tooling (x-file-name attributes), not actual React code issues
Chart dimensions warning when chart container has -1 width/height. Occurs during lazy loading.

bugs_fixed.root_cause: Missing import for CalendarDays icon from lucide-react and missing import for ReactMarkdown/remarkGfm
bugs_fixed.fix: Added imports: import ReactMarkdown from 'react-markdown'; import remarkGfm from 'remark-gfm'; import { ..., CalendarDays, ... } from 'lucide-react'

bugs_fixed.root_cause: defaultBlogPosts constant was referenced but not defined in the file (was in UserPages.jsx)
bugs_fixed.fix: Added defaultBlogPosts constant definition after imports

critical_code_review_comments: The defaultBlogPosts constant was defined in UserPages.jsx (line 969) but used in BlogPages.jsx without import - this was a refactoring oversight now fixed
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 16 pages tested successfully after major frontend refactoring. App.js was refactored from 6991 lines to ~110 lines by extracting 23 page components into 14 separate page files under /pages/. BlogPages.jsx had a missing import bug that was fixed during this test session. The hydration warnings in console are from development tooling (x-file-name attributes) not actual React issues. Backend was not changed and was not tested.
